pub struct Endpoint<'r, const ROLE: u8> {
pub struct RouteBranch<'e, 'r, const ROLE: u8> {
Endpoint::send pub fn send<'a, 'e, M>( &'e mut self, payload: &'a M::Payload, ) -> impl core::future::Future<Output = core::result::Result<(), EndpointError>> + 'a + use<'a, 'e, 'r, M, ROLE> where M: crate::g::Message + 'a, M::Payload: WireEncode + 'a, 'e: 'a, 'r: 'a, {
Endpoint::recv pub fn recv<'e, M>( &'e mut self, ) -> impl core::future::Future< Output = core::result::Result<<M::Payload as WirePayload>::Decoded<'e>, EndpointError>, > + 'e where M: crate::g::Message + 'e, M::Payload: WirePayload, {
Endpoint::offer pub fn offer<'e>( &'e mut self, ) -> impl core::future::Future< Output = core::result::Result<RouteBranch<'e, 'r, ROLE>, EndpointError>, > + 'e {
RouteBranch::label pub fn label(&self) -> u8 {
RouteBranch::recv pub fn recv<M>( self, ) -> impl core::future::Future< Output = core::result::Result<<M::Payload as WirePayload>::Decoded<'e>, EndpointError>, > + use<'e, 'r, M, ROLE> where M: crate::g::Message, M::Payload: WirePayload, {
RouteBranch::send pub fn send<'a, M>( self, payload: &'a M::Payload, ) -> impl core::future::Future<Output = core::result::Result<(), EndpointError>> + 'a + use<'a, 'e, 'r, M, ROLE> where M: crate::g::Message + 'a, M::Payload: WireEncode + 'a, 'e: 'a, 'r: 'a, {
pub struct EndpointError {
